title: 有馬記念の後に・福、来たれり

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember her, everyone? Do you
remember the Umamusume named
Matikanefukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
She was a greedy little girl with no talent of her
own who trusted only in luck to win the day.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
However, that girl still took the Arima Kinen. In
exchange, she gave up everything she had.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But now she has become a god. Having
transcended Umahood to reach the divine realm,
her pearlescent glow shines down upon—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no! I'm still me! I'm still alive, and kicking
harder than ever!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My great health record is my best feature, so
don't write me off just yet! May your happiness
flourish like a flower in full bloom—and peace
reign in the Grand Prix!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I did it, Trainer! Are you happy? Was training me
worth it?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sniff! That's all I wanted to hear! All right! Now I just need to take this energy to the winner's interview!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, everyone. I'm afraid I've gone and
made this joyous occasion even more exuberant!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
After blessing the chrysanthemum stage, fortune
has now smiled upon Nakayama as well!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fortune smiles on those who wish for it, and
happiness comes to those who seek it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With that, I wish you all a happy New Year! It will
be my extreme pleasure to bring good cheer to
all of you again next year!
